description_long: This lamp features a long, cylindrical arm extending horizontally between two distinct end components. One end has a rounded, disc-like base, while the opposite end features a more complex assembly with a cylindrical housing and two prominent adjustment knobs. The lamp's structure is predominantly metallic, with a matte black finish that gives it a modern, industrial appearance. The adjustment knobs suggest the lamp can be repositioned or angled, likely for task or work lighting. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible decorative embellishments, focusing on functionality and adjustability. The lamp appears suitable for mounting on a wall or workbench, providing directed illumination in urban or industrial settings.
description: A matte black, industrial-style adjustable lamp with a long arm, disc base, and dual adjustment knobs for positioning.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the lamp arm, the disc base on one end, and the adjustment knob assembly on the other.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular face of the disc base and the cylindrical adjustment housing directly opposite.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the adjustment assembly and disc base positions reversed.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the adjustment housing and the circular end of the lamp arm.
